Contents 
  1. Description

Interface NetworkMessage

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
All Known Subinterfaces:
ClientRequest, ServerMessage
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbandonRecoveredMatchRequest, AddPlayerToLobbyRequest, ChooseTotemRequest, CreateMatchRequest, DisconnectPlayerRequest, EndGameMessage, ErrorMessage, GameStartedMessage, GameStateMessage, ListMatchesRequest, LobbyStateMessage, MatchAbandonedMessage, MatchClosedMessage, MatchesListMessage, MatchJoinedMessage, MatchRecoveringMessage, PickBonusCardRequest, PickCardsRequest, PingMessage, PingRequest, PlaceTotemRequest, ReconnectRequest, RemovePlayerFromLobbyRequest, SetExpectedPlayersRequest, TotemSelectionMessage
public interface NetworkMessage extends Serializable
Marker interface for all messages exchanged between client and server. Extends Serializable because every message must travel both via socket (through ObjectOutputStream) and via RMI.
